name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)
